mapper.select: SELECT svc_genre_id FROM tb_svc_genre WHERE parents_svc_genre_id != 0 ORDER BY rand() LIMIT #{size}
SELECT rcmmd_mforu_id FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND now() BETWEEN disp_std_start_dt AND disp_std_end_dt LIMIT 1
SELECT rcmmd_similar_track_id FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track WHERE character_no =#{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() LIMIT 1
SELECT rcmmd_listen_mood_id FROM tb_rcmmd_listen_mood WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE A FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu_list A INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_mforu B ON A.rcmmd_mforu_id = B.rcmmd_mforu_id AND B.character_no = #{characterNo}
DELETE A FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list A INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_similar_track B ON A.rcmmd_similar_track_id = B.rcmmd_similar_track_id AND B.character_no = #{characterNo}
DELETE FROM tb_rcmmd_listen_mood WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND rcmmd_listen_mood_id = #{rcmmdId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_rcmmd_mforu ( character_no , disp_std_start_dt , disp_std_end_dt , svc_genre_id , disp_sn , create_dtime, create_std_dtime ) VALUES ( #{recommendTrackDto.characterNo}, addtime(adddate(curdate(),0), '00:00:00'), addtime(adddate(curdate(),0), '23:59:59'), #{recommendTrackDto.svcGenreId}, #{recommendTrackDto.dispSn}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: INSERT INTO tb_rcmmd_mforu_list SELECT #{rcmmdId}, track_id, 1 FROM ( SELECT track_id FROM tb_track WHERE disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN disp_start_dtime AND disp_end_dtime LIMIT 10000 ) a ORDER BY rand() LIMIT 50
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_rcmmd_similar_track ( character_no , disp_std_start_dt , disp_std_end_dt , svc_genre_id , disp_sn , create_dtime ) VALUES ( #{recommendTrackDto.characterNo}, addtime(adddate(curdate(),0), '00:00:00'), addtime(adddate(curdate(),0), '23:59:59'), #{recommendTrackDto.svcGenreId}, #{recommendTrackDto.dispSn}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list SELECT #{rcmmdId}, track_id, 1 FROM ( SELECT aa.track_id FROM tb_track aa WHERE aa.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN aa.disp_start_dtime AND aa.disp_end_dtime LIMIT 10000 ) a ORDER BY rand() LIMIT 50

INSERT INTO tb_rcmmd_tpo (character_no, disp_std_start_dt, disp_std_end_dt, category_id, chnl_id, weekend_yn, tm_cd, sittn_disp_sn, chnl_disp_sn) SELECT #{characterNo}, date_add(now(), INTERVAL -10 DAY), date_add(now(), INTERVAL 30 DAY), category_id, chnl_id, weekend_yn, tm_cd, sittn_disp_sn, chnl_disp_sn FROM tb_rcmmd_tpo WHERE character_no = 1234
